title: Point Blank: Recipe
description: All alternative recipes for Vic's Point Blank mod and weapon packs
body:
### Want to play with Vic's PointBlank mod but you don't like the crafting system?
### Not a problem! Because this mod adds a modular crafting system for all weapon types!

So, what does this mod add? Instead of adding iron and a couple other items, you need to make special weapon components(not from the original mod!) and then combine them in the workbench.

- To create any weapon you will need to make its base (it is different for each type) and then depending on the complexity of creating a weapon other components.

When creating all the crafts, I tried to replicate the shape of the main weapon by adding components as they would look relative to the assembled weapon model, so all crafts must be balanced.

Recommended and addiction mod:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  [Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank) - Required Dependency

  [PointBlank: Jelly](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pointblank-jelly) - Compare with PB:Recipe

  [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - Recommended for use
</details>

Support gunpack:

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/vics-point-blank-s-t-a-l-k-e-r-pack))

Handguns Galore ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/vics-point-blank-handguns-galore))

R.O.C. Taiwan ([CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/vics-point-blank-roc-pack))

and many others...

When using ganpaks, polymorph is definitely required

(This mod is not from [vic4games](https://modrinth.com/user/vic4games) so don't ask him to fix bugs. Better go to my discord server and write there about bugs or your ideas to improve the mod)

Download note: versions marked "gunpacks" support gunpack crafts. Normal versions without "gunpacks" support only PB crafts
You can download any version, the only thing that will change is that your logs will have errors about crafts (not critical).

Q&A
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
  Q: Can I use this mod in a modpack?
---
  A: Yes, of course.
  
  Q: Can I put this mod again somewhere?
---
  A: No. Under no circumstances, but you can discuss it with me in my discord server

  Q: Does this mod have anything to do with Vic? Is it a new mod?
  ---
  A: Not at all. So if you have any problems installing this mod, please contact me for help
  
  Q: Why are there so many errors in my logs?
  ---
  A: You may have downloaded the gunpack version. All these errors are related to crafting, because they can not find the result of the crafting related to other add-ons to Vic Point Blank. This is not critical, ignore it.
</details>

Support for forge version remains at 1.20.1, support for third party weapon addons will continue to be released. If you want forge to be 1.21+, let me know.
Fabric support will be from 1.20.1 and up to the latest versions


# MOD IS UNDER DEVELOPMENT!!!
At the moment, I have several plans to improve the quality of interaction with the mod. Here are some of them:
- Revamp the way weapons are created.
- To try to make crafting more realistic by adding more detail.
- Add 3d models for components.
- mmm, develop the mod further?

You can join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/EC6jfnnjX4) and help in the development of the mod.

Forge version created with MCreator.
Fabric version is created by manually writing code.
